code:
def binary_search_iterative(arr, target):
    left, right = 0, len(arr) - 1
    while left <= right:
        mid = left + (right - left) // 2  # To prevent potential overflow
        if arr[mid] == target:
            return mid
        elif arr[mid] < target:
            left = mid + 1
        else:
            right = mid - 1
    return -1

def binary_search_recursive(arr, target, left, right):
    if left > right:
        return -1
    
    mid = left + (right - left) // 2 # To prevent potential overflow
    
    if arr[mid] == target:
        return mid
    elif arr[mid] < target:
        return binary_search_recursive(arr, target, mid + 1, right)
    else:
        return binary_search_recursive(arr, target, left, mid - 1)

# Recursive version wrapper (to match iterative signature)
def binary_search_recursive_wrapper(arr, target):
    return binary_search_recursive(arr, target, 0, len(arr) - 1)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Test cases
    sorted_array = [2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23, 38, 56, 72, 91]
    
    # Iterative Version
    print("Iterative Binary Search:")
    print(f"Target 12 found at index: {binary_search_iterative(sorted_array, 12)}") # Expected: 3
    print(f"Target 2 found at index: {binary_search_iterative(sorted_array, 2)}")   # Expected: 0
    print(f"Target 91 found at index: {binary_search_iterative(sorted_array, 91)}") # Expected: 9
    print(f"Target 7 found at index: {binary_search_iterative(sorted_array, 7)}")   # Expected: -1
    print(f"Target 100 found at index: {binary_search_iterative(sorted_array, 100)}") # Expected: -1
    print(f"Target -5 found at index: {binary_search_iterative(sorted_array, -5)}") # Expected: -1
    print(f"Target 23 found at index: {binary_search_iterative(sorted_array, 23)}") # Expected: 5

    print("\nRecursive Binary Search:")
    print(f"Target 12 found at index: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(sorted_array, 12)}") # Expected: 3
    print(f"Target 2 found at index: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(sorted_array, 2)}")   # Expected: 0
    print(f"Target 91 found at index: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(sorted_array, 91)}") # Expected: 9
    print(f"Target 7 found at index: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(sorted_array, 7)}")   # Expected: -1
    print(f"Target 100 found at index: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(sorted_array, 100)}") # Expected: -1
    print(f"Target -5 found at index: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(sorted_array, -5)}") # Expected: -1
    print(f"Target 23 found at index: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(sorted_array, 23)}") # Expected: 5

    empty_array = []
    print("\nTest with empty array:")
    print(f"Iterative Target 5: {binary_search_iterative(empty_array, 5)}") # Expected: -1
    print(f"Recursive Target 5: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(empty_array, 5)}") # Expected: -1

    single_element_array = [42]
    print("\nTest with single element array:")
    print(f"Iterative Target 42: {binary_search_iterative(single_element_array, 42)}") # Expected: 0
    print(f"Recursive Target 42: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(single_element_array, 42)}") # Expected: 0
    print(f"Iterative Target 10: {binary_search_iterative(single_element_array, 10)}") # Expected: -1
    print(f"Recursive Target 10: {binary_search_recursive_wrapper(single_element_array, 10)}") # Expected: -1
